speaker: patient_bot
text: Good morning. I'm calling to schedule an appointment.

speaker: you_human
text: What is your name? Can I know your name?

speaker: patient_bot

speaker: you_human
text: And okay. So can I know your date of birth?

speaker: patient_bot
text: Sure — my date of birth is August 2nd, 2002.

speaker: patient_bot
text: Could you please let me know what the available dates and times are?

speaker: you_human
text: 28 21st, and 22nd 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. 9 a.m. to 2:00 p.m.

speaker: patient_bot
text: Got it. I'll take the slot on the 21st at 9 a.m.

speaker: patient_bot
text: Thank you for confirming the appointment!
